# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy

variables:
  CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR: "ci/scripts"
  BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR: "build"
  ARTIFACT_DIR: "artifacts"
  ENABLE_PARALLEL_BUILD: "true"
  MAX_PARALLEL_JOBS: "4"

.shared_runner_template:
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - chmod +x ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true
    - chmod +x ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
    - chmod +x ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/**/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}
    - mkdir -p ${ARTIFACT_DIR}

prepare:dependencies:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: prepare
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/prepare.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom prepare script..."
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/prepare.sh
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/prepare.py" ]; then
        echo "Running custom prepare script (Python)..."
        python3 ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/prepare.py
      else
        echo "No custom prepare script found. Skipping..."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/
      - node_modules/
      - vendor/
      - .gradle/
      - .m2/
    expire_in: 1 hour
  allow_failure: false

build:custom:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: build
  needs:
    - prepare:dependencies
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom build script..."
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.py" ]; then
        echo "Running custom build script (Python)..."
        python3 ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.py
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.js" ]; then
        echo "Running custom build script (Node.js)..."
        node ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.js
      else
        echo "ERROR: No custom build script found!"
        exit 1
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/
      - dist/
      - target/
      - out/
    expire_in: 1 day
  parallel:
    matrix:
      - BUILD_VARIANT: ["release", "debug"]
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_PARALLEL_BUILD == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: on_success

build:single:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: build
  needs:
    - prepare:dependencies
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh" ]; then
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.py" ]; then
        python3 ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.py
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.js" ]; then
        node ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.js
      else
        echo "ERROR: No custom build script found!"
        exit 1
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/
      - dist/
      - target/
      - out/
    expire_in: 1 day
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_PARALLEL_BUILD != "true"'
      when: always

test:unit:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: test
  needs:
    - job: build:custom
      optional: true
    - job: build:single
      optional: true
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom test script..."
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.sh
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.py" ]; then
        echo "Running custom test script (Python)..."
        python3 ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.py
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.js" ]; then
        echo "Running custom test script (Node.js)..."
        node ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.js
      else
        echo "No custom test script found. Skipping tests..."
      fi
  artifacts:
    when: always
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/test-results/
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/test-reports/
      - coverage/
      - test-results/
    reports:
      junit:
        - ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/test-results/*.xml
        - test-results/*.xml
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage/cobertura-coverage.xml
    expire_in: 7 days
  coverage: '/Coverage: \d+\.\d+%/'
  allow_failure: true

test:integration:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: test
  needs:
    - job: build:custom
      optional: true
    - job: build:single
      optional: true
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/integration-test.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom integration test script..."
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/integration-test.sh
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/integration-test.py" ]; then
        echo "Running custom integration test script (Python)..."
        python3 ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/integration-test.py
      else
        echo "No custom integration test script found. Skipping..."
      fi
  artifacts:
    when: always
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/integration-results/
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/integration-reports/
    expire_in: 7 days
  allow_failure: true
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: always
    - when: manual

test:custom:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: test
  needs:
    - job: build:custom
      optional: true
    - job: build:single
      optional: true
  script:
    - |
      for script in ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test-*.sh; do
        if [ -f "$script" ]; then
          echo "Running custom test script: $script"
          $script || echo "Script $script failed but continuing..."
        fi
      done
      
      for script in ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test-*.py; do
        if [ -f "$script" ]; then
          echo "Running custom test script: $script"
          python3 $script || echo "Script $script failed but continuing..."
        fi
      done
  artifacts:
    when: always
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/custom-test-results/
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/custom-test-reports/
    expire_in: 7 days
  allow_failure: true

package:artifacts:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: package
  needs:
    - job: build:custom
      optional: true
    - job: build:single
      optional: true
    - job: test:unit
      optional: true
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom package script..."
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.sh
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.py" ]; then
        echo "Running custom package script (Python)..."
        python3 ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.py
      else
        echo "No custom package script found. Creating default package..."
        tar -czf ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/build-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/ dist/ target/ out/ 2>/dev/null || true
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/
      - "*.tar.gz"
      - "*.zip"
      - "*.jar"
      - "*.war"
      - "*.deb"
      - "*.rpm"
    expire_in: 30 days

deploy:staging:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: deploy
  needs:
    - package:artifacts
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy-staging.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom staging deployment script..."
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy-staging.sh
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom deployment script with staging environment..."
        export DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT="staging"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy.sh
      else
        echo "No custom deployment script found. Skipping deployment..."
      fi
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop" || $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "staging"'
      when: on_success
    - when: manual
  allow_failure: false

deploy:production:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: deploy
  needs:
    - package:artifacts
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy-production.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom production deployment script..."
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy-production.sh
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom deployment script with production environment..."
        export DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT="production"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy.sh
      else
        echo "ERROR: No custom deployment script found for production!"
        exit 1
      fi
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
  allow_failure: false

custom:job:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: .pre
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/custom-job.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom job script..."
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/custom-job.sh
      else
        echo "No custom job script found. Skipping..."
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$RUN_CUSTOM_JOB == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never
  allow_failure: true

cleanup:
  extends: .shared_runner_template
  stage: .post
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/cleanup.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom cleanup script..."
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/cleanup.sh
      else
        echo "Running default cleanup..."
        rm -rf ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/* || true
        rm -rf node_modules/ || true
        rm -rf .gradle/ || true
      fi
  when: always
  allow_failure: true
